judgeScores.justification: The organization demonstrates excellent hierarchical balance with intuitive 2-3 level nesting (e.g., photos/2024/personal/) and consistent lowercase naming conventions. The code/ directory shows mature architectural separation into frontend/backend/data_scripts/config, while the comprehensive MANIFEST.md includes clear tree diagrams and detailed file tables. Minor weaknesses include the manifest's undercounting of code files (25 vs 28) and the debatable placement of design_assets under photos/ rather than a separate design/ directory, though these don't significantly impact usability.
